title: Drag and Drop
description: A flexible set of directives for implementing drag-and-drop functionality in your Angular applications. The drag-drop system consists of four main directives: axDrag for draggable elements, axDropList for sortable lists, axDropZone for drop areas, and axDragHandle for custom drag handles.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using axDrag directive to make an element draggable

sections.title: Axis Lock
sections.description: Use the dragLockAxis input to constrain dragging to either the 'x' (horizontal) or 'y' (vertical) axis

sections.title: Boundary
sections.description: The dragBoundary input restricts movement to within a specified HTML element or a CSS selector

sections.title: Drag Handle
sections.description: Use the axDragHandle directive to specify a child element that acts as the handle for dragging the parent

sections.title: Drop Zone
sections.description: The axDropZone directive creates an area where draggable items can be dropped. It can emit events on hover and drop

sections.title: Clone Drag
sections.description: Set dragElementClone to true to drag a copy of the element, leaving the original in place. A custom dragClonedTemplate can also be provided

sections.title: Drop List
sections.description: The axDropList directive enables reordering of axDrag items within a container. Drag items within the list to sort them

sections.title: Connected Lists
sections.description: You can connect multiple axDropList containers by giving them the same dropListGroup. This allows items to be dragged from one list to another

props.name: dragData
props.description: Data to be associated with the draggable element

props.name: dragDisabled
props.description: Whether dragging is disabled for this element

props.name: dragTransition
props.description: Whether to apply transition animations during drag operations

props.name: dragElementClone
props.description: Whether to create a clone of the element during dragging

props.name: dropZoneGroup
props.description: The group this draggable element belongs to for drop zone interactions

props.name: dragStartDelay
props.description: Delay in milliseconds before drag starts after pointer down

props.name: dragResetOnDblClick
props.description: Whether to reset the element position on double click

props.name: dragLockAxis
props.description: Axis to lock dragging to ('x' for horizontal, 'y' for vertical, null for free movement)

props.name: dragClonedTemplate
props.description: Custom template to use for the cloned element during dragging

props.name: dragCursor
props.description: Cursor style to use during dragging

props.name: dragBoundary
props.description: Element or selector that constrains the dragging area

props.name: dragTransitionDuration
props.description: Duration of transition animations in milliseconds

events.name: dragPositionChanged
events.description: Emitted when the drag position changes during dragging

methods.content:
/**
* Sets the position of the draggable element.
* This method allows programmatic control of the element's position.
* 
* @param x - The horizontal position in pixels
* @param y - The vertical position in pixels
* @returns void
*/
setPosition(x: number, y: number): void

/**
* Sets the position of the cloned element during dragging.
* This method is used internally to position the drag clone.
* 
* @param x - The horizontal position in pixels
* @param y - The vertical position in pixels
* @returns void
*/
setClonePosition(x: number, y: number): void

props.name: sortingDisabled
props.description: Whether sorting within this list is disabled

props.name: dropListGroup
props.description: The group this drop list belongs to. Dragging is only allowed between lists of the same group

props.name: dropListOrientation
props.description: The layout orientation of the list

events.name: dropListDropped
events.description: Emitted when an item is dropped into the list, providing information about the drop operation

methods.content:
/**
* Checks if the given drag item is the one currently active in this list.
* 
* @param dragItem - The drag directive to check
* @returns true if the item is currently being dragged in this list
*/
isDragActiveForThisList(dragItem: AXDragDirective): boolean

/**
* Prepares the list for sorting when a drag operation starts from within this list.
* 
* @param dragItem - The item that is being dragged
* @returns void
*/
prepareSort(dragItem: AXDragDirective): void

/**
* Prepares the list for receiving an item that started dragging from another list.
* 
* @param dragItem - The item entering this list
* @returns void
*/
enter(dragItem: AXDragDirective): void

/**
* Calculates the new placeholder index based on the pointer's position and applies visual shifts.
* 
* @param event - The pointer move event
* @param dragItem - The item being dragged
* @returns void
*/
sort(event: PointerEvent, dragItem: AXDragDirective): void

/**
* Finalizes the drop, emits the drop event, and resets the list's state.
* 
* @param event - The pointer up event
* @param droppedItem - The item that was dropped
* @param sourceList - The list where the drag originated
* @returns void
*/
finalizeSort(event: PointerEvent, droppedItem: AXDragDirective, sourceList: AXDropListDirective): void

/**
* Resets the transforms on all items and cancels the current sort operation.
* 
* @param dragItem - Optional drag item to cancel for
* @returns void
*/
cancelSort(dragItem?: AXDragDirective): void

props.name: dropZoneGroup
props.description: The group this drop zone belongs to. Only draggable items with matching group can be dropped here

events.name: onElementDrop
events.description: Emitted when a draggable element is dropped into this drop zone

events.name: onElementHover
events.description: Emitted when a draggable element enters or leaves this drop zone

props.name: array
props.description: Array in which to move the item

props.name: fromIndex
props.description: Starting index of the item

props.name: toIndex
props.description: Index to which the item should be moved

methods.content:
/**
* Moves an item one index in an array to another.
* @param array Array in which to move the item.
* @param fromIndex Starting index of the item.
* @param toIndex Index to which the item should be moved.
*/
function moveItemInArray<T = any>(array: T[], fromIndex: number, toIndex: number): void

props.name: currentArray
props.description: Array from which to transfer the item

props.name: targetArray
props.description: Array into which to put the item

props.name: currentIndex
props.description: Index of the item in its current array

props.name: targetIndex
props.description: Index at which to insert the item

methods.content:
/**
* Moves an item from one array to another.
* @param currentArray Array from which to transfer the item.
* @param targetArray Array into which to put the item.
* @param currentIndex Index of the item in its current array.
* @param targetIndex Index at which to insert the item.
*/
function transferArrayItem<T = any>(currentArray: T[], targetArray: T[], currentIndex: number, targetIndex: number): void
